correctness.summary: All 39 EARS (R1-R39) verified in code + tests; 26 ACs covered by 52 new FE tests (20 hook + 28 component + 4 home integration). Hook performs exactly 1 fetch on mount (R2), filter messageCount>0 + age<7d (R3, AC4/AC5), max-by-updatedAt via reduce not relying on BE ordering (R4), dismiss-until storage gate with parseable ISO check (R6/R7, AC6/AC7/AC10), 24h dismiss writes ISO + clears state synchronously (R8/AC8), no-throw on API/storage failure (R11, AC9). Component double-Pressable card vs dismiss with separate accessibilityRole=button (R19/AC15), title/subtitle/a11y branches verified (R15-R18, AC13/AC14), formatResumptionTimeAgo 4 boundaries + NaN fallback covered (R25-R29, AC18/AC19), React.memo (R24). BE: ListSessionsResult gains museumId/lastArtworkTitle (R30), deriveLastArtworkTitle pure helper guards Array.isArray + length + title.trim() (R31), zero DB migration, OpenAPI SessionListItem extended with optional/nullable (R32). isListSessionsResponseDTO tolerates absent and validates type when present (R33). home.tsx wires onResume → router.push WITHOUT createSession (R35, asserted in home-resumption-banner.test.tsx).
findings: BE: no unit test was added for `deriveLastArtworkTitle` despite being an exported pure helper with non-trivial branches (Array guard, empty array, missing title, whitespace title). The behaviour is exercised only indirectly via mapping. needs-follow-up (small uncovered surface).

scopeFidelity.summary: Zero schema migration (museum_id + visit_context jsonb already on entity, verified by reading the diff against chat-session.service.ts which adds only mapping + helper). Zero new endpoint — FE filters client-side on top 10 most recent sessions (R30 reuse pattern). Zero FE GPS / device-location prompt V1 (memory project_geolocation_pipeline respected). All 6 Open Questions deferred V1.1+ as documented in §0.7 + §5. No feature flag, no new dep (verified package.json unchanged FE+BE). Placement strictly in (tabs)/home.tsx between heroCard and DailyArtCard — exactly per dispatcher decision; NOT duplicated in conversations tab.

kissDryHexagonal.summary: Hook isolated under features/chat/application/useResumableSession.ts, no global store introduced (NFR1). Pure helpers: pickResumable (local, FE) + deriveLastArtworkTitle (exported, BE) + formatResumptionTimeAgo (exported, FE). All three are O(1) on the input and testable independently. React.memo on the component (R24). One fetch on mount with useRef cancellation across the await boundary — sound. Storage façade reused (no expo-secure-store overreach for non-sensitive timestamp). Tokens reused from existing DS (no theme key invention). The minor `t as ResumptionTFunction` cast on the i18next TFunction is documented in-line and mirrors the existing formatDistance pattern.
findings: pickResumable is module-private (not exported), so it cannot be unit-tested in isolation — covered indirectly via hook tests. Minor — not a defect.

Component uses useState(()=>Date.now()) to crystallise `now` at mount which causes a per-mount staleness that could surface 'just now' too long on long-lived home views. Documented as acceptable V1, V1.1 tick refresh deferred. acceptable.

a11yDesignSystem.summary: DS tokens verified to exist in shared/ui/themes.ts (theme.cardBackground, theme.cardBorder, theme.surface, theme.textPrimary, theme.textSecondary — both light + dark variants present). No placeholder/invented tokens. Card root = accessibilityRole=button + accessibilityLabel (a11y_label_with_artwork OR a11y_label_fallback branch) + accessibilityHint (a11y_hint). Dismiss is a SEPARATE Pressable (R19/AC15) with its OWN role=button + own accessibilityLabel — VoiceOver will announce two distinct buttons. hitSlop=12 + 32dp container = ≥44dp effective hit target (WCAG 2.5.5). numberOfLines={1} on title + subtitle — full text still readable via root accessibilityLabel. Thumb is Ionicons not unicode emoji (R23). No animation introduced → WCAG 2.3.3 N/A.
findings: Subtitle includes timeAgo computed at mount — VoiceOver users will hear 'X min ago' fixed to mount time. Minor; acceptable V1.

securityHonesty.summary: Telemetry console.debug emits ONLY counts/flags (has_artwork_title boolean, has_museum boolean, age_hours integer) — no title text, no museumName, no sessionId (NFR4 honoured, grep-verified). Storage key value = non-sensitive ISO timestamp; AsyncStorage usage (not SecureStore) is appropriate. lastArtworkTitle traverses BE via an already-accessible route — no new data egress. The honest event?.stopPropagation() guard is explicitly documented: 'fireEvent.press may emit undefined event in tests'. The eslint-disable on cancelledRef post-await carries an Approved-by + ≥20 chars rationale (compliant with ESLint discipline doctrine). UFR-013: no fabricated claims — green-agent narration in tracking.md reports exact 2625/2625 + 2051/2051 + lint exit 0 + openapi:validate PASS + check:i18n PASS, all reproduced under review. NFR11 honoured: no *_ENABLED flag.
findings: console.debug calls are unconditional (no DEV gate or sampling). In production the [B2] log lines will fire once per home mount — acceptable (counts only, no PII) but worth tracking if log volume becomes a signal.

items.rationale: BE has no notion of currentMuseumId without geofence/server signal, FE has no global museumId store V1. Payload already exists, server-side 5-min cache already applied. Zero migration cost.

items.tradeoff: No FE GPS / strict museumId gating V1
items.rationale: Doctrine feedback_hybrid_product_philosophy + memory project_geolocation_pipeline. Permission prompt on home = friction. museumId captured BE-side to unlock V1.1 strict gating without contractual rupture.

items.tradeoff: Ionicons placeholder thumb (no real artwork image)
items.rationale: BE list response doesn't expose artwork image URL. Adding lastArtworkImageUrl would require either signed URL regeneration or denormalisation — explicit Open Q6 V1.1 trade. V1 banner still recognisable via title + museumName.
KISS V1. Per-session tracking requires either a server-side dismissed flag (new column) or local map of session IDs — Open Q3 V1.1 if friction signal arrives.

items.tradeoff: Single banner even when multiple recent sessions
items.rationale: Pi.ai pattern = single resumption cue. Stack of 2-3 would compete with DailyArtCard for visual budget. Open Q4 V1.1 stacked option.

items.tradeoff: Walk-mode + default both eligible (no intent filter)
items.rationale: Walk resumption is even more pertinent (multi-stop tours). Filter to default-only would amputate the strongest use case. Open Q5 V1.1 toggle if signal.

Honest — RN's fireEvent.press may emit undefined event in tests; the guard prevents crash without changing production semantics (real touch event always has stopPropagation). Documented in the inline comment with UFR-013-style rationale.

be_test_chat.note: Process exited non-zero on coverage threshold (chat scope statements 65.78% vs gate 88%) but that is expected for a scope-limited run (global gate not applicable to slice). Zero test failures.

be_openapi_validate.result: PASS (69 paths, 77 operations, Musaium API v1.1.0)

fe_test_full.result: 2625 PASS / 0 failed / 241 suites all green / 4 snapshots passed

fe_check_openapi_types.result: Diff vs HEAD shows the regenerated file has 4 expected additions (museumId+lastArtworkTitle + 2 JSDoc). Working tree is the regenerated snapshot. Pre-commit diff is normal for a still-uncommitted feature branch. The generated types ARE in sync with the BE OpenAPI spec — verified via grep 'lastArtworkTitle' on openapi.ts.

top.finding: deriveLastArtworkTitle exported pure helper has no direct unit test (only indirect coverage via the mapping). A 5-line test file would cover the Array.isArray guard, empty-array branch, missing-title coercion, and whitespace-only title trim → null fallback.
top.recommendation: Optional follow-up — add tests/unit/chat/chat-session.service.derive-last-artwork-title.test.ts. Not a blocker.

top.finding: now is crystallised at mount via useState(()=>Date.now()); long-lived home view will show stale 'X min ago' until next mount. Spec explicitly accepts this V1 (§2.7).
top.recommendation: Track via product signal; V1.1 add 60s tick if needed.

top.finding: console.debug fires unconditionally on every home mount when a session is shown. No __DEV__ gate or sampling.
top.recommendation: Optional — wrap in __DEV__ once telemetry pipeline is wired (separate concern, not B2 scope).

recommendation.rationale: All 39 EARS satisfied, 26 ACs covered, 5/5 gates PASS, 7/7 honest tradeoffs acceptable (no blockers, no follow-ups required for merge). Build verification: BE lint exit 0, BE chat tests 2051/2051 PASS, BE openapi:validate PASS, FE lint exit 0, FE tests 2625/2625 PASS, FE check:i18n PASS, FE generated types in sync with BE spec (4 expected additions, regeneration was performed). Zero migration, zero new endpoint, zero new dep, zero feature flag, zero unicode emoji, zero breaking change. weightedMean = 92.4 ≥ 85.
optionalFollowups: Add direct unit test for deriveLastArtworkTitle (BE) — small uncovered surface on the pure helper.
Consider __DEV__ gating on console.debug telemetry (cross-cutting, not B2-specific).
